name: GPU Simulator API and Memory Allocation
description: Verify correct use of the GPU simulator API and MatrixMemoryAllocator for matrix lifetimes.

name: GPU Instruction Usage Constraints
description: Ensure there is no standard-output logging, no direct Matrix writes, and no instruction targets reused for the same Matrix.

name: Readability of src.hpp
description: Assess whether comments, naming, and structure in src.hpp are clear and readable.
